$comment: Sequential execution manifest for the context-lean + one-way-door program (epic #243). pipeline-advance.yml reads this. kick: 'mention' posts @codex on the issue when its predecessor's PR merges; 'pause' notifies the repo owner on the epic and stops; 'none' is a manually-managed step. automerge: true requests the safe auto-merge labels on the closing PR (the deterministic path evaluator in scripts/agent/check-safe-automerge.mjs remains the actual gate).

pipeline.note: A0 in flight on PR #244; human merge starts the chain
A2 touches repo root + .gitignore; human merge
A4 governance rewrite; HUMAN PR REVIEW REQUIRED before merge
B1 reachability invariant; test guard changes, human merge per T2
B2 learning capture; schema surface, human merge per T3
B3 update/cancel: requires human spike with a real Google account before implementation starts
